entries.spanish: yo hago
entries.english: I do / I make

entries.spanish: tú haces
entries.english: you do / you make

entries.spanish: él hace
entries.english: he does / he makes

entries.spanish: ella hace
entries.english: she does / she makes

entries.spanish: usted hace
entries.english: you do / you make (formal)

entries.spanish: nosotros hacemos
entries.english: we do / we make

entries.spanish: ellos hacen
entries.english: they do / they make

entries.spanish: ustedes hacen
entries.english: you all do / you all make

entries.spanish: yo hice
entries.english: I did / I made

entries.spanish: tú hiciste
entries.english: you did / you made

entries.spanish: él hizo
entries.english: he did / he made

entries.spanish: ella hizo
entries.english: she did / she made

entries.spanish: usted hizo
entries.english: you did / you made (formal)

entries.spanish: nosotros hicimos
entries.english: we did / we made

entries.spanish: ellos hicieron
entries.english: they did / they made

entries.spanish: ustedes hicieron
entries.english: you all did / you all made

entries.spanish: yo haré
entries.english: I will do / I will make

entries.spanish: tú harás
entries.english: you will do / you will make

entries.spanish: él hará
entries.english: he will do / he will make

entries.spanish: ella hará
entries.english: she will do / she will make

entries.spanish: usted hará
entries.english: you will do / you will make (formal)

entries.spanish: nosotros haremos
entries.english: we will do / we will make

entries.spanish: ellos harán
entries.english: they will do / they will make

entries.spanish: ustedes harán
entries.english: you all will do / you all will make

entries.spanish: Hacemos estudio bíblico los miércoles.
entries.english: We have Bible study on Wednesdays.

entries.spanish: ¿Qué hace el pastor después del servicio?
entries.english: What does the pastor do after the service?

entries.spanish: Mi mamá hace tamales en Navidad.
entries.english: My mom makes tamales at Christmas.

entries.spanish: Hago la cena todas las noches.
entries.english: I make dinner every night.

entries.spanish: ¿Qué haces cuando llegas a un nuevo país?
entries.english: What do you do when you arrive in a new country?

entries.spanish: El chef hace la mejor sopa de la ciudad.
entries.english: The chef makes the best soup in the city.

entries.spanish: Mi papá hace ejercicio por las mañanas.
entries.english: My dad exercises in the mornings.

entries.spanish: Mis amigos y yo hacemos planes para el fin de semana.
entries.english: My friends and I make plans for the weekend.

entries.spanish: Mi perro hace mucho ruido cuando llegan visitas.
entries.english: My dog makes a lot of noise when guests arrive.

entries.spanish: Los estudiantes hacen la tarea en la biblioteca.
entries.english: The students do their homework at the library.

entries.spanish: El doctor hace un chequeo completo cada año.
entries.english: The doctor does a complete checkup every year.

entries.spanish: ¿Qué haces en tu trabajo?
entries.english: What do you do at your job?

entries.spanish: Ella hace música con su familia.
entries.english: She makes music with her family.

entries.spanish: Hace mucho calor hoy.
entries.english: It is very hot today.

entries.spanish: David hizo lo que Dios le pidió.
entries.english: David did what God asked him to do.

entries.spanish: ¿Qué hiciste después del servicio?
entries.english: What did you do after the service?

entries.spanish: Hicimos un recorrido por toda la ciudad.
entries.english: We took a tour of the entire city.

entries.spanish: El chef hizo un plato especial para nosotros.
entries.english: The chef made a special dish for us.

entries.spanish: Mi abuela hizo arroz con leche para el postre.
entries.english: My grandmother made rice pudding for dessert.

entries.spanish: Hice la limpieza de la casa el sábado.
entries.english: I cleaned the house on Saturday.

entries.spanish: Mi papá hizo un asado para toda la familia.
entries.english: My dad made a barbecue for the whole family.

entries.spanish: Mis amigos hicieron una fiesta sorpresa para mí.
entries.english: My friends threw a surprise party for me.

entries.spanish: Los estudiantes hicieron una presentación muy buena.
entries.english: The students gave a very good presentation.

entries.spanish: El doctor hizo todos los exámenes necesarios.
entries.english: The doctor ran all the necessary tests.

entries.spanish: Hicieron muchos cambios en la oficina.
entries.english: They made a lot of changes at the office.

entries.spanish: El grupo hizo una canción nueva para la iglesia.
entries.english: The group made a new song for the church.

entries.spanish: Haremos un estudio sobre el libro de Juan.
entries.english: We will do a study on the book of John.

entries.spanish: El pastor hará un anuncio especial el domingo.
entries.english: The pastor will make a special announcement on Sunday.

entries.spanish: ¿Qué harás durante tus vacaciones?
entries.english: What will you do during your vacation?

entries.spanish: El chef hará un menú especial para la cena.
entries.english: The chef will make a special menu for dinner.

entries.spanish: Haremos una cena especial para celebrar.
entries.english: We will make a special dinner to celebrate.

entries.spanish: Haré las compras del supermercado mañana.
entries.english: I will do the grocery shopping tomorrow.

entries.spanish: Mi hermano hará una sorpresa para el cumpleaños de mi mamá.
entries.english: My brother will make a surprise for my mom's birthday.

entries.spanish: Mis amigos harán una reunión el próximo sábado.
entries.english: My friends will have a get-together next Saturday.

entries.spanish: Los estudiantes harán un proyecto en grupo.
entries.english: The students will do a group project.

entries.spanish: El doctor hará una cirugía la próxima semana.
entries.english: The doctor will perform surgery next week.

entries.spanish: ¿Qué harán ustedes para mejorar las ventas?
entries.english: What will you all do to improve sales?

entries.spanish: El coro hará una presentación especial en Navidad.
entries.english: The choir will do a special performance at Christmas.
